intro: Xeraea argentina, also known as "Ginkgo biloba of the Andes," is a medicinal plant native to Argentina and Chile, belonging to the Asteraceae family. This plant is valued for its various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments, such as respiratory issues and gastrointestinal problems.
